## Self-checklist

- [ ] If new content is added, it is also referenced from `references/INDEX.md` and (if applicable) `references/quick-reference.md`.
- [ ] If a template or workflow step was changed, examples in `references/anti-patterns.md` that reference it still match.
- [ ] If a new anti-pattern is added, it includes: symptom, wrong example, correct example, fix.
- [ ] If a new command was added, it appears in the README and `references/quick-reference.md`.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] No broken links (CI will verify with lychee).
- [ ] No new markdownlint errors (CI will verify).
